untranslatable_reason: Signal requires historical volatility mean and standard deviation calculations with configurable thresholds (deviation_threshold_sigma, minimum_dte, lookback_period_days) that cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. hvol_20 is available but the signal requires dynamic mean reversion bands relative to a rolling mean and volatility of volatility, which are not in the allowed indicator set. Additionally, the signal explicitly requires longer-dated options (DTE-based position sizing/weighting) which cannot be implemented in the entry/exit rule structure.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using hvol_20 (20-day historical volatility) as a proxy, but the core logic requires: (1) rolling mean of HV over lookback_period_days, (2) rolling std_dev of HV, (3) threshold-based deviation bands around that mean, (4) expiration-date weighting logic. The signal is fundamentally a multi-parameter volatility mean reversion strategy that requires custom volatility metrics not present in the allowed indicator list.
